title: New ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure
description: Security researchers have identified a new ransomware variant specifically designed to target cloud-based infrastructure. The campaign uses compromised CI/CD pipelines to deploy malicious code.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The ransomware campaign poses a significant threat to organizations relying on cloud infrastructure by exploiting compromised CI/CD pipelines to deploy malicious code. This could lead to data encryption, service outages, and potential data exfiltration, severely impacting business operations and customer trust.
recommended_actions: Conduct an immediate review of CI/CD pipelines to identify and remediate any unauthorized access or vulnerabilities.
Implement robust endpoint detection and response (EDR) solutions and monitor cloud infrastructure for unusual activity.
Ensure regular backups of critical data are performed and stored securely offline to facilitate recovery in the event of an attack.

title: Show HN: Open-source vulnerability scanner
description: New tool automatically scans dependencies for known vulnerabilities and suggests patches. Gaining traction in the security community.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The open-source vulnerability scanner itself poses minimal risk; however, if improperly configured or exploited, it could expose sensitive dependency data or provide attackers with insights into an organization's software stack.
recommended_actions: Evaluate the tool in a controlled environment before deployment to ensure it aligns with your organization's security policies.
Regularly update the tool to the latest version to mitigate any potential vulnerabilities within the scanner itself.
Restrict access to the scanner and its output to authorized personnel only to prevent sensitive data leakage.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-12060.

description: The SSH service of CelloOS developed by Cellopoint has an Improper Access Control vulnerability, allowing authenticated remote attackers to bypass the enforced command restrictions and execute operating system commands outside the originally authorized scope.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-12059.

recommended_actions: Monitor official CVE databases and GitHub Security advisories for updates and patches related to CVE-2026-9271.

title: The Secure Copy Content Protection and Content Locking WordPress plugin before 5.1.5 does not...
description: The Secure Copy Content Protection and Content Locking WordPress plugin before 5.1.5 does not sanitise and escape some of its settings, which could allow high privilege users such as admin to perform Stored Cross-Site Scripting attacks even when the unfiltered_html capability is disallowed (for example in multisite setup).

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with unknown severity. CVE: CVE-2026-9269.

description: The authentication mechanism of a certain function in the PcSuite has a defect, which may result in information leakage within the range of a Bluetooth connection.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-11535.

title: Idira Privileged Access Manager (PAM) Self-Hosted Vault versions prior to 15.0.3, 14.6.5, 14.2.7,...
description: Idira Privileged Access Manager (PAM) Self-Hosted Vault versions prior to 15.0.3, 14.6.5, 14.2.7, and 14.0.8 exhibit a validation vulnerability. Under specific circumstances and configuration scenarios, processing unexpected input could potentially lead to an unexpected service termination, resulting in a localized denial of service (DoS). CyberArk Security Bulletin: CA26-17

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in Idira Privileged Access Manager (PAM) Self-Hosted Vault could allow an attacker to exploit input validation flaws, leading to a localized denial of service (DoS). This could disrupt privileged access management operations, potentially impacting critical business processes.
recommended_actions: Immediately update Idira PAM Self-Hosted Vault to the latest patched versions (15.0.3, 14.6.5, 14.2.7, or 14.0.8) to mitigate the vulnerability.
Review and validate system configurations to ensure proper input handling and minimize exposure to unexpected input scenarios.
Monitor system logs and implement intrusion detection mechanisms to identify and respond to potential exploitation attempts.

title: A malicious actor with access to the network and low privileges could exploit an Improper Input...
description: A malicious actor with access to the network and low privileges could exploit an Improper Input Validation vulnerability found in certain devices running UniFi OS to escalate privileges within such UniFi OS devices or instances.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2026-47369.

title: Improper verification of access permissions when modifying permissions through the Administration...
description: Improper verification of access permissions when modifying permissions through the Administration Control Panel (ACP) allowed an authenticated administrator to grant permissions beyond the level authorized for their account, resulting in privilege escalation within the administrative interface.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-47366.

title: A malicious actor with access to the network and low privileges could exploit an Improper Input...
description: A malicious actor with access to the network and low privileges could exploit an Improper Input Validation vulnerability found in certain devices running UniFi OS to execute a Command Injection within such UniFi OS devices or instances.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows a malicious actor with low privileges to execute arbitrary commands on UniFi OS devices or instances, potentially leading to full system compromise, data exfiltration, lateral movement within the network, and disruption of services.
recommended_actions: Immediately apply the latest security patches or firmware updates provided by the vendor to address CVE-2026-47370.
Restrict network access to UniFi OS devices by implementing network segmentation and limiting access to trusted IP ranges.
Monitor logs and network traffic for any unusual activity or signs of exploitation, and enable intrusion detection/prevention systems (IDS/IPS).

title: SQL injection vulnerability in phpBB profile field migration due to improper handling of user...
description: SQL injection vulnerability in phpBB profile field migration due to improper handling of user-supplied profile field data during migration, allowing execution of arbitrary SQL queries. Only applies to phpBB forums that had been updated from versions prior to phpBB 3.3.8 and have not been updated to 3.3.11 or newer yet.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The SQL injection vulnerability in phpBB profile field migration could allow attackers to execute arbitrary SQL queries, potentially leading to data breaches, unauthorized access, or database corruption. This poses a significant risk to forums that have not been updated to secure versions.
recommended_actions: Immediately update phpBB forums to version 3.3.11 or newer to patch the vulnerability.
Review and monitor database logs for any suspicious or unauthorized SQL queries.
Implement web application firewalls (WAFs) to detect and block SQL injection attempts.

title: Under certain network configurations, a malicious actor with access to network could exploit an...

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-48610.

title: Improper authentication checks in the OAuth implementation allow account hijacking even when...
description: Improper authentication checks in the OAuth implementation allow account hijacking even when OAuth is not configured or enabled leading to unauthorized access in default installations.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2026-48611.

title: Improper state verification in the OAuth implementation could allow an attacker to manipulate the...
description: Improper state verification in the OAuth implementation could allow an attacker to manipulate the authentication flow and cause a victim’s account to be linked to an attacker-controlled account. This can result in unauthorized account linking and potential account takeover.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in the OAuth implementation could allow attackers to manipulate the authentication flow, leading to unauthorized account linking and potential account takeovers. This could result in data breaches, identity theft, and unauthorized access to sensitive information.
recommended_actions: Implement strict state parameter validation in the OAuth flow to ensure the integrity of the authentication process.
Conduct a thorough review and update of the OAuth implementation to address any improper state verification issues.
Monitor authentication logs for unusual activity and implement additional security measures such as multi-factor authentication (MFA) to mitigate the risk of account takeover.

title: Argument injection vulnerability in WordPress Toolkit before 6.11.0 as used in cPanel & WHM,...
description: Argument injection vulnerability in WordPress Toolkit before 6.11.0 as used in cPanel & WHM, allows remote authenticated users to bypass cross-tenant authorization and execute arbitrary wp-toolkit CLI commands as another account.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows remote authenticated users to bypass cross-tenant authorization and execute arbitrary WordPress Toolkit CLI commands as another account. This could lead to unauthorized access, privilege escalation, data breaches, and potential compromise of WordPress installations hosted on affected systems.
recommended_actions: Immediately update WordPress Toolkit to version 6.11.0 or later to patch the vulnerability.
Review and monitor user account activity for any unauthorized access or suspicious behavior.
Implement strict access controls and restrict access to cPanel & WHM to trusted IPs or VPNs.

title: Virtual attribute handling in Ping Identity PingDirectory in affected versions allows only...
description: Virtual attribute handling in Ping Identity PingDirectory in affected versions allows only authorized users to exhaust java memory heap when recent login history is enabled and copying virtual attributes that reference ds-privilege-name values.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-20746.

title: A use-after-free vulnerability exists in MongoDB Server's server-side JavaScript engine when...
description: A use-after-free vulnerability exists in MongoDB Server's server-side JavaScript engine when converting BSON documents to JavaScript arrays. An authenticated user with read privileges who is able to run server-side JavaScript (for example, via $where or $function) can cause the server to access memory that has already been freed. This may result in disclosure of information from the mongod process memory or a denial of service through a server crash.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-11933.

title: The Presto Player plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the ...
description: The Presto Player plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the 'link_url' parameter of the [presto_player_overlay] shortcode in versions up to, and including, 4.2.0 This is due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping in the getOverlays() function, which copies the link_url shortcode attribute directly into the overlay configuration without scheme validation, allowing javascript: URIs to survive and be rendered as the href of a clickable anchor element

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows attackers to inject malicious JavaScript into the 'link_url' parameter of the [presto_player_overlay] shortcode, potentially leading to data theft, session hijacking, or defacement of affected websites. This could compromise user trust and result in reputational damage.
recommended_actions: Update the Presto Player plugin to the latest patched version as soon as it becomes available.
Implement a Web Application Firewall (WAF) to detect and block malicious input targeting the vulnerable parameter.
Audit and sanitize user inputs across the website to prevent exploitation of similar vulnerabilities.

title: CVE-2026-10586 - The Gutenberg Essential Blocks – Page Builder for Gutenberg Blocks & Patterns plugin for WordPress i
description: The Gutenberg Essential Blocks – Page Builder for Gutenberg Blocks & Patterns plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Server-Side Request Forgery in all versions up to, and including, 6.1.3 via the `save_ai_generated_image()` function. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with Author-level access and above, to make web requests to arbitrary locations originating from the web application and can be used to query and modify information from internal services.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-10586.
